headline: South Florida AI job market heating up with hundreds of openings and new initiatives reshaping how companies hire tech talent

stories.title: MDC Opens AI Innovation Hub in Kendall for Hands-On Learning
stories.summary: Miami Dade College launched an AI Innovation Hub on March 16 to provide students and professionals direct access to cutting-edge AI tools and industry collaboration. Lowkey game-changing for folks trying to upskill in South Florida.
stories.takeaway: Local education is catching up to industry demand—legit opportunity to get trained without leaving Miami.

stories.title: Google Bringing AI-Powered Tech to Fort Lauderdale Movie Studio Complex
stories.summary: Infinite Reality partnered with Google to integrate Gemini AI into a new $163.9M movie studio opening in Fort Lauderdale in 2026. Literally mixing entertainment with cutting-edge tech—positions the city as a next-gen hub.
stories.takeaway: Major infrastructure play that'll create jobs across entertainment, VFX, and AI engineering roles.

stories.title: South Florida Tech Growth Initiative Announced at eMerge Americas
stories.summary: Stephen Ross and Florida Council of 100 launched a regional initiative to position Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach as the global hub for tech investment and entrepreneurship. Bridges international capital with local markets.
stories.takeaway: Tbh, this could pull a ton of AI funding and talent to the region—watch for more startup clusters forming.

stories.title: 2,437+ AI Jobs Open Across Florida as Companies Scale Hiring
stories.summary: Florida's AI job market hit over 2,400 open positions with top companies like Deloitte, Scribd, and Google actively recruiting in Miami and Fort Lauderdale. Ranges from ML engineers to AI trainers—something for most skill levels.
stories.takeaway: Fr fr, if you've got tech chops, South Florida is lowkey the place to be right now.

watchNext.title: Miami AI Agent Summit (April 5, 2026)
watchNext.why: 200+ AI engineers, founders, and investors gathering to discuss autonomous agents transforming industries—perfect for networking and understanding where AI careers are heading next.

watchNext.title: AI Engineering Conference Miami (April 20-21, 2026)
watchNext.why: 500+ AI engineers, CTOs, and VPs meeting at Hyatt Regency Miami for Frontier Tech Week—literally the biggest AI engineering gathering coming to South Florida.
